title: nepeta wettsteinii
intro: Nepeta wettsteinii, also known as Catmint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues due to its calming and sedative properties, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and coughs. Nepeta wettsteinii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs like lemon balm and chamomile to enhance its effects.
